metadata.description: Talon — a personal marketplace of Claude Code & Codex skills.

plugins.name: hello-world
plugins.description: Example plugin with a friendly greeting skill. Copy it as a template for new plugins.

plugins.name: terraform-module-steering
plugins.description: Steering-document generator + spec-driven orchestrator for secure-by-default Terraform/OpenTofu modules (greenfield + brownfield): per-service CIS/FSBP research, wrap-upstream, minimal inputs, hardcoded non-overridable security, docs + verification pipeline.

plugins.name: talon-plugin-manager
plugins.description: Maintainer plugin: onboard, release, and distill plugins on the Talon marketplace (dual Claude Code + Codex, naming, semver bump + tag, PR-only).
